message:
fix: Self-recursion detection in freezeModule API

The freezeModule API was only checking for tail_call opcode to detect
self-recursive functions, but fib uses call1 for recursion. This fix
copies the proper detection logic from the CLI main() which looks for
get_var_ref0 followed by call1 pattern.

This enables the native int64 fast path for fib, making EdgeBox 2.17x
faster than Bun and 2.69x faster than Node.js for fib(45).
